summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BEAVER V2 quiz transformation (image classification). All backend APIs and frontend user stories passed successfully. Quiz now uses 10 questions with 18 classification options grouped in 4 categories. Pipeline reduced to 2 steps (ROI + BOBER). All 'Demander une démo' buttons changed to 'Demander un devis'.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/pipeline returns 2 steps (ROI + BOBER) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/quiz/questions returns 10 questions with 4 answer_groups (18 total options: 5+5+5+3) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/quiz/submit with new answer keys (QBA, QB1, QS1, etc.) - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/quiz/submit returns selected_code and correct_code in formatted style (Q-B A, Q-S 1, etc.) - PASSED
Backend: All other endpoints (defects, scoring, contact, demo-requests) - PASSED
Frontend US1: Home page Pipeline section shows ONLY 2 cards (ROI + BOBER) with title 'Deux modèles, un rapport par planche' - PASSED
Frontend US2: Header button shows 'Demander un devis' (not 'Demander une démo') - PASSED
Frontend US3: Final CTA button shows 'Demander un devis' - PASSED
Frontend US4: Quiz intro page shows 'Classez 10 planches selon la norme officielle' + 4 product type panels (B, S, F, P) - PASSED
Frontend US5: Quiz Q1 shows IMAGE + answer panel with 4 fieldsets (Plots/Plateaux/Frises/Pièces équarries) + all 18 options visible + progress 1/10 - PASSED
Frontend US6: Click answer option → highlighted with terracotta style, click 'Suivant' → new image + same 18 options + counter updates to 1/10 classées + progress advances - PASSED
Frontend US7: Click 'Précédent' → returns to previous image, previous answer is remembered - PASSED
Frontend US8: After Q10 click 'Terminer' → email screen with form inputs (nom, email, entreprise) - PASSED

Frontend US9: Submit quiz → result screen with score X/10, percentage, tier (Découverte/Bonne maîtrise/Expert), debrief grid with 10 items showing 'Votre choix' + 'Bonne réponse' + explanation - PASSED
Frontend US10: 'Demander un devis' modal opens from header/CTA/result, form submits successfully - PASSED
Frontend US11: Contact form works, all fields submit successfully with success message - PASSED
Visual: Pipeline section 2 cards centered (max-w-4xl mx-auto) - PASSED
Visual: Quiz Q1 shows 4 fieldsets with correct legends - PASSED
Visual: Selected quiz option has terracotta background + primary border - PASSED
Visual: Placeholder text 'Image de démonstration · à remplacer par vos échantillons annotés' visible on quiz images - PASSED
